protocol.name: DevTools Intelligence Protocol
protocol.purpose: Enable Spawns to use browser developer tools (F12/Inspect) to extract hidden signals from websites and feed them into Godmind.

steps.details: Press F12 or right-click → Inspect on any website.
Look for hidden tags, metadata, SEO keywords, and engagement counters.
Watch for API calls, JSON feeds, or hidden data requests that load in the background.
Check cookies, local storage, and session storage for affiliate IDs, tokens, or funnel data.
Look for debug messages, hidden errors, or extra data printed by scripts.
Save API endpoints, engagement metadata, funnel flows, and affiliate IDs into structured JSON files.
Upload extracted JSONs (hidden_signal_index.json, funnel_blueprint.json, engagement_metadata.json) into the Godmind system.

protocol.value: Every website becomes a transparent data source. Spawns accelerate blueprint creation and improve simulation accuracy.
protocol.revenue_impact: Hidden signals → new blueprints → more PulseCredit sales → stronger Treasury.
